data.body: 08a8 (F4) IMPLEMENTED + held-out validated: full oracle 16 passed/3 skipped (edge cases pass); REAL zizmor clean (1 annotated suppression, teeth-verified: unpin->error[unpinned-uses]); REAL actionlint clean; make verify-mcp-pin OK (mcp-publisher v1.8.0 digest confirmed independently). Real action SHAs resolved. Cleaned up subagent's ruff extend-exclude (formatted my test files instead). make lint+typecheck+module-size clean. Committed 766f97e79, rebased onto origin/main 52d7a3dc1 (clean), pushed to Gerrit.
